## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] If the OpenAPI spec changed, ran `pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec run codegen`
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md` if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, or other secrets committed
